title: Cobblemon Detail Viewer
description: Allows users to view detailed information about Pokémon in a HUD, or when hovering over Pokémon in the PC Boxes.
body:
# Cobblemon Detail Viewer ![New Updated UI for v1.5.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/904dc67ed20fcb29e35ea6fea56ee2146b8744f4.png)

This mod allows players to view tons of information about their Pokémon when either looking at them in the world or when hovering over them in the Cobblemon PC GUI. Users can control the information that is visible by adjusting the settings in the mod menu. Users are able to see owner, level, type, tera type, size, ability, nature, marks, aspects like alpha, shiny, and much more. This mod provides its own UI, however, we do provide a fallback to those would rather use the Jade UI, but functionality is more limited. Regardless if you use our UI or not, Jade will still show for items, and other entities, if you have it installed! The Poké Ball icon is shown when the Pokédex has registered that species as “CAUGHT”. The PC Icon that is shown on the HUD is a count of how many Pokémon of that same species you have in your PC/Party. Right now, it is limited to only a species check because I am trying to keep all the mods as lightweight in calculations as possible. However, in the future, I still might consider adding some optional filters in the settings. This mod is completely client-side. *Not affiliated with the official Cobblemon project.*
